title: Earthy Crispy Croatian Chicken Bake
description: A lowfat, crispy baked chicken dish with a tangy gherkin relish, perfect for postworkout recovery.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 °C (400 °F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt, smoked paprika, oregano, rosemary, garlic powder, pepper, and a pinch of salt.
Drizzle each chicken breast with olive oil, then spread the yogurt mixture evenly over all sides.
In a separate shallow dish, combine the panko breadcrumbs with a little salt.
Press the yogurt‑coated chicken into the breadcrumbs, ensuring an even crust.
Place the coated breasts on the prepared baking sheet, leaving space between them.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, or until the chicken is golden brown and reaches an internal temperature of 75 °C (165 °F).
While the chicken bakes, gently warm the gherkin relish in a saucepan over low heat for about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve each breast topped with warm gherkin relish and, if desired, a sprinkle of fresh herbs.
